expectations.text: 조회 훅이 hooks/apis/queries/ 경로 아래에 배치된다 (tcf profile: API query hook -> apis/{domain}/queries)

expectations.evidence: Both hooks follow the pattern: hooks/apis/queries/useGetNotifications/index.ts and hooks/utils/useNotificationFilter/index.ts

expectations.text: NotificationList 컴포넌트에 직접적인 useEffect+fetch 패턴이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: NotificationList.tsx contains no useEffect or fetch calls. It delegates to useGetNotifications and useNotificationFilter hooks only.
NotificationList.tsx line 20: 'if (isLoading)' renders a skeleton loading UI with data-testid='notifications-loading'
NotificationList.tsx line 30: 'if (error)' renders error message with data-testid='notifications-error'
NotificationList.tsx line 65: 'filtered.length === 0' renders empty message with data-testid='notifications-empty'

expectations.text: 훅 이름이 use 접두사로 시작한다 (tcf profile: hook prefix = use)
expectations.evidence: Both hooks start with 'use': useGetNotifications and useNotificationFilter

expectations.text: 훅이 화살표 함수로 정의된다 (shared profile: function style = arrow)
expectations.evidence: useGetNotifications defined as 'const useGetNotifications = (): UseGetNotificationsResult => {' and useNotificationFilter defined as 'const useNotificationFilter = ({ notifications }: ...): UseNotificationFilterResult => {'
